blended.narrative: Tuckerman Ravine is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days. Strong winds with gusts to 43 mph may cause lift holds. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

Tomorrow: partly cloudy, highs of 41°F, gusts to 41 mph.
Thursday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 39°F, gusts to 56 mph. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.0" of snow, highs of 18°F, gusts to 57 mph. Expect powder.
Saturday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 17°F, gusts to 45 mph. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
